plan.overview: Two layout improvements: (1) PageHeader restructured to two rows with a divider, and (2) a new MobileDetailHeader component added above the gradient card on the three detail pages, replacing the embedded back-link.

task.title: Restructure PageHeader to two-row layout with divider
task.description: Replace the current single-row flex layout with a two-row structure: - Row 1: h1 title (left) + UserMenu (right), always rendered. - Row 2: actions slot, right-aligned, only rendered when actions prop is provided. - A border-b divider (border-border) sits below the two-row block. - Wrap both rows in a single container div with mb-6 (or whatever spacing currently sits on the consumer pages above the content). - The PageHeaderProps interface (title, actions?) is UNCHANGED.
task.verification: Open any list page (e.g. /accounts) — title and UserMenu on row 1, Add button on row 2 right-aligned, divider visible below. No layout regressions on pages without an actions prop (dashboard, more, settings).

task.title: Create MobileDetailHeader component
task.description: New shared component. Props: backHref (string), title (string). Layout: relative flex items-center justify-center, md:hidden wrapper. - Left: Link wrapping ArrowLeft icon (size 20), href=backHref, absolute left-0, text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground. - Center: span with the title text, font-semibold text-base. - Right: empty (nothing rendered). Transparent background, no border, no divider. Add padding: py-3 (vertical breathing room between this and the gradient card).
task.verification: Component file exists and compiles. Props typed correctly. No runtime errors.

task.title: Apply MobileDetailHeader to accounts/[id] page
task.description: In the happy-path return block: 1. Import MobileDetailHeader. 2. Add <MobileDetailHeader backHref="/accounts" title="Accounts" /> immediately before the gradient card div (before the mb-6 wrapper div). 3. Remove the existing back-link from inside the mobile layout of the gradient card (the Link with ArrowLeft and "Accounts" text inside the "flex md:hidden flex-col gap-3" div). 4. Remove the now-unused ArrowLeft import from lucide-react if no longer needed. Do NOT touch the skeleton or error return blocks.
task.verification: On mobile viewport: back arrow + "Accounts" header appears above gradient card. Gradient card no longer contains a back-link. Desktop layout is unaffected.

task.title: Apply MobileDetailHeader to cards/[id] page
task.description: Same pattern as task 2.2: 1. Import MobileDetailHeader. 2. Add <MobileDetailHeader backHref="/cards" title="Cards" /> immediately before the gradient card div. 3. Remove the back-link from inside the mobile layout of the gradient card. 4. Remove the now-unused ArrowLeft import from lucide-react if no longer needed. Do NOT touch skeleton or error return blocks.
task.verification: On mobile: back arrow + "Cards" header above gradient card. Gradient card clean. Desktop unaffected.

task.title: Apply MobileDetailHeader to cards/groups/[groupName] page
task.description: Same pattern as task 2.2: 1. Import MobileDetailHeader. 2. Add <MobileDetailHeader backHref="/cards" title="Cards" /> immediately before the gradient card div. 3. Remove the back-link from inside the mobile layout of the gradient card. 4. Remove the now-unused ArrowLeft import from lucide-react if no longer needed. Do NOT touch skeleton or error return blocks.
task.verification: On mobile: back arrow + "Cards" header above gradient card. Gradient card clean. Desktop unaffected.

task.title: Lint and build
task.description: Run npm run lint — fix any errors. Run npm run build — ensure zero errors.

task.title: QA pipeline
task.description: Spawn the qa-pipeline agent for: - src/components/shared/PageHeader.tsx - src/components/shared/MobileDetailHeader.tsx - src/app/accounts/[id]/page.tsx - src/app/cards/[id]/page.tsx - src/app/cards/groups/[groupName]/page.tsx

task.title: Write verification doc
task.description: Document what was built, what was changed, and how each task was verified.
task.verification: File exists and covers all tasks.
